sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_cast (id INT, value VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO test_cast (id, value) VALUES (1, CAST(123 AS VARCHAR(10)));
UPDATE test_cast SET value = CAST(id AS VARCHAR(10)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, CAST(value AS INT) FROM test_cast;
SELECT id, value FROM test_cast WHERE CAST(value AS INT) > 100;
